calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JENNIFER A. SMITH OF THE BUCHALTER NEMER, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, TEL. NO. 1-213-891-0700 EXT. 5265 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ERWIN SOLORZANO, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. ERWIN SOLORZANO'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Denied. The Sheriff to withold $250.00 per pay period. The leving officer is directed to release $500.00 to the judgment creditor for the payment on the judgment and to return $$683.45 to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
